info.title: Ordo Orchestrator Management API
info.description: HTTP management API exposed by the Ordo orchestrator.

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/agents` — list agents from the persistent store.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing name

409.description: Agent is not in a removable state

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/agents/{node_id}/drift` — list drift records for an agent.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default 50, max 500.

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/agents/{node_id}/drift` — drift check against the agent's
last successful apply snapshot.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description:
Only return samples taken at or after this UNIX timestamp (seconds).
Defaults to `now - retention_window` so the response covers the full
retention window when omitted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
Maximum number of samples to return. When omitted, all samples in the
window are returned.

204.description: No samples in the requested window

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/agents/{node_id}/state/operations` — list state operations for
a single agent, most recent first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of operations to return in a single page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description:
Zero-based offset into the most-recent-first ordering. Combine with
`limit` to page through history.

200.description: Paged state operations for the agent

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/agents/{node_id}/state/operations/{operation_id}/output` —
captured script output for a state operation.
get.description:
Per design 0015, captured stdout/stderr is stored in
`<data-dir>/apply-outputs/<operation_id>.output.cbor`. The response `output`
object is keyed by `"module_name/identity"` — the composite key avoids
collisions when two modules define a script resource with the same identity.
If no output file exists (no scripts produced output, or the file was lost),
the endpoint returns an empty `output` object — the operation record itself
remains authoritative.

200.description: Captured script output for the operation

put.summary: `PUT /api/v1/agents/{node_id}/tags` — replace all tags on an agent.

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/assignments/{name}/apply` — apply an assignment to every
agent its selector currently matches.

`POST /api/v1/assignments/{name}/plan` — plan an assignment against every
agent its selector currently matches.

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/audit` — query the audit log. Available to any
authenticated operator.

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Filter by agent node ID or operator-assigned name.

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Filter by operator ID or username.

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Filter by exact dotted event type.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Earliest timestamp to include, RFC 3339 / ISO 8601.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Latest timestamp to include (exclusive), RFC 3339 / ISO 8601.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor (a ULID — the last event ID from the previous page).

delete.summary:
`DELETE /api/v1/audit?before=<iso8601>` — manually prune old audit
events. Admin only.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description:
Cutoff timestamp (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601); events strictly before
this point are deleted.

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/audit/retention` — read the current audit retention
setting. Available to any authenticated operator.

put.summary:
`PUT /api/v1/audit/retention` — update the audit retention setting.
Admin only.

post.summary: `POST /api/v1/auth/challenge` — issue a nonce for the operator to sign.

`POST /api/v1/auth/verify` — verify the signed nonce and issue a session
token.

400.description: Invalid request body or channel type

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test` — send a test notification through a
channel (Admin only).

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/drift/{drift_id}` — fetch a single drift record by ID.

put.summary:
`PUT /api/v1/maintenance-windows/{id}` — update a maintenance window
(Admin only). Typically used to end a window early.

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/modules/{name}` — get a module's details and content.

`GET /api/v1/notifications` — list notifications for the requesting
operator.

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description:
When `true`, only return notifications the requesting operator has
not yet marked as read.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/notifications/read-all` — mark all notifications as read
for the requesting operator.

`POST /api/v1/notifications/{id}/read` — mark a single notification as
read for the requesting operator.

parameters.name: include_removed
parameters.description: Include soft-deleted operators in the response.

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/state/operations` — list state operations across all agents,
most recent first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of operations to return in a single page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description:
Zero-based offset into the most-recent-first ordering. Combine with
`limit` to page through history.

200.description: Paged state operations across all agents

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/state/operations/{operation_id}` — single operation detail
including per-resource results.
`GET /api/v1/status` — return protocol version and health status.
`GET /api/v1/tags` — list all distinct tag keys and values.

409.description: Agent does not have remote terminal enabled

504.description: Timed out waiting for the agent

public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key of the new operator.

role.description: Role to assign. Defaults to `operator` if omitted.

username.description:
Required, immutable, human-readable username for the operator. Must
satisfy [`ordo_store::validate_identifier`].

AgentResponse.description: A single agent in the `GET /api/v1/agents` response.

name.description: Operator-assigned, immutable name. `null` while the agent is pending.

ApiApprovalAction.description: An operator action to approve or reject an agent.

AuditEventResponse.description: One event in the response body of `GET /api/v1/audit`.

AuditPrincipal.description: Actor or target representation in audit responses.

AuditRetentionRequest.description:
Request body for `PUT /api/v1/audit/retention`.

`retention_days = None` clears the override and falls back to the
configuration-file default. `Some(0)` is not allowed — use `None` to
disable pruning.

public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key of the operator.

nonce.description: Hex-encoded 32-byte nonce to be signed by the operator.

public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key of the operator.

signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature of the challenge nonce.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when the token expires.

ChannelResponse.description: Response body for a single notification channel.

config.description: Type-specific configuration as a JSON object.

ends_at.description: UTC end time, Unix timestamp in seconds.

starts_at.description: UTC start time, Unix timestamp in seconds.

MaintenanceWindowResponse.description: Response body for a single maintenance window.

node_id.description: Node ID of the agent these samples belong to.

samples.description:
Samples within the requested window, ordered by `collected_at`
ascending.

MetricsSampleResponse.description:
A single metrics sample in an API response.

Mirrors the wire format `MetricsReport` and the stored `MetricsSnapshot`.
All metric fields are nullable: a `null` value means the agent could not
collect that metric (the OS does not expose it, the agent has metrics
disabled, or the metric is not yet implemented for this platform).

collected_at.description: UNIX timestamp (seconds) when the agent took this sample.

cpu_usage.description: System-wide CPU usage at sample time, as a percentage (0–100).

disk_total.description: Total disk space across all mounted non-virtual filesystems, in bytes.

disk_used.description: Used disk space across all mounted non-virtual filesystems, in bytes.

uptime.description: Time since last boot in seconds.

NotificationResponse.description: A single notification in the API response.

OperatorResponse.description: Response body for a single operator.

SecretResponse.description: Response body for a single secret (never includes value).

SecretRestrictionBody.description: Restriction as received over the API.

name.description:
Required when `status` is `approved`: the immutable, operator-chosen
human-readable name to assign to the agent. Ignored otherwise.

public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key of this orchestrator.

TerminalSessionResponse.description: A single session in the `GET /api/v1/terminal` response.

ends_at.description: New end time (for ending early), Unix timestamp in seconds.

expires_at.description:
New expiry date. Absent = don't change; `null` = clear; string = set.
Uses `Value` instead of `Option<Option<String>>` to satisfy clippy's
`option_option` lint while still distinguishing absent from null.

name.description: Module name (must match the `name` field in the YAML).
